name: Aurelionite - ROR2
description:
This was by far my most difficult bot to make. Who would've thought that a character with as much lore and backstory as Aurelionite would be difficult..?
HAHAHAHAHA I CAN'T TAKE IT ANYMORE! I'M CRASHING OUT!!!

Nah jk.
Difficulty aside, this was one of my longest projects by far, and it wasn't just because of the research (AKA reading the logs that I don't do with my 300+ hours of game time). It was mainly because I've been lacking a bit of motivation doing ROR2 bots. It's not that I don't like it anymore, it's just that I could really use a change of pace. If anyone has a suggestion, anything besides risk of rain, please tell me.

Included info about Mithrix and Providence, but not their appearances (I don't wanna bloat token count). This is still somewhat WIP, so I may make changes later.

Yapped too long, get to it.
creator: Zombie458
